title: catalpa ternifolia
intro: Catalpa ternifolia, also known as the Chinese catalpa or Eastern catalpa, is a deciduous tree native to Asia, particularly in China and India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Catalpa ternifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal benefits, or used to make capsules and tablets for easier consumption.
